evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-25 bounded first-party South Dakota DHS surfaces. The current `/en/localoffices` route still serves only a JS shell in raw HTML and embeds `aemPages.localoffices.title` as `Page Not Found` in the page state instead of exposing a public local-office directory. The current `Contact Us` page exposes only statewide phone, email, and Pierre mailing contacts. The current `Staff and Program Directory` page exposes division and program staff tables, but no county field, no local-office list, and no county-to-office contract. South Dakota therefore still lacks a truthful public county-grade local-office routing contract on the current official DHS host family.
